{"id":"da-cjr","title":"Implement forum connector - scrape Tor-based forums for threat intel","description":"Scrape BreachForums, XSS.is, Exploit.in and similar forums via Tor SOCKS proxy. Parse post titles, content, author. Track last-seen post IDs per forum. Handle forum-specific HTML parsing. Forum URLs and selectors stored in source.config JSONB. Use aiohttp with aiohttp-socks through tor_socks_proxy. Must handle .onion resolution and Tor circuit failures gracefully.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-11T19:09:28Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-11T19:09:28Z"}
